mapper.sql: select id, parentId, type, name, headImgUrl, phone, password, wallet, status, role, deleteStatus, city, openId, commissionType, commissionValue, createTime from agent
mapper.insert:
insert into agent
parentId, type, name, headImgUrl, phone, password, wallet, status, role, deleteStatus, city, openId, commissionType, commissionValue, createTime,
#{parentId}, #{type}, #{name}, #{headImgUrl}, #{phone}, #{password}, #{wallet}, #{status}, #{role}, #{deleteStatus}, #{city}, #{openId}, #{commissionType}, #{commissionValue}, #{createTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from agent where id in
#{id}
